(remove the property setting and it will be selected by default) 2026-07-02T17:05:02.685+03:30 INFO 26180 --- [sarzamin-qesseha] [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: create table categories ( id bigint not null auto_increment, name varchar(100) not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table comments ( id bigint not null auto_increment, content varchar(1000) not null, created_at datetime(6) not null, author_id bigint not null, parent_id bigint, tale_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table favorites ( id bigint not null auto_increment, created_at datetime(6) not null, tale_id bigint not null, user_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table listening_progress ( id bigint not null auto_increment, duration integer, finished bit not null, seconds integer not null, updated_at datetime(6) not null, tale_id bigint not null, user_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table ratings ( id bigint not null auto_increment, created_at datetime(6) not null, stars integer not null, updated_at datetime(6) not null, tale_id bigint not null, user_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table storyteller_requests ( id bigint not null auto_increment, admin_note varchar(500), created_at datetime(6) not null, decided_at datetime(6), message varchar(500), status enum ('APPROVED','PENDING','REJECTED') not null, user_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table tale_categories ( tale_id bigint not null, category_id bigint not null, primary key (tale_id, category_id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table tales ( id bigint not null auto_increment, approved_at datetime(6), audio_content_type varchar(255), audio_path varchar(255) not null, cover_path varchar(255), created_at datetime(6) not null, description TEXT, duration_seconds integer, review_note varchar(500), status enum ('APPROVED','PENDING','REJECTED') not null, title varchar(150) not null, storyteller_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table user_roles ( user_id bigint not null, role enum ('ADMIN','LISTENER','STORYTELLER') ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: create table users ( id bigint not null auto_increment, avatar_path varchar(255), created_at datetime(6) not null, display_name varchar(100) not null, enabled bit not null, password_hash varchar(255) not null, username varchar(50) not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB Hibernate: alter table categories drop index UKt8o6pivur7nn124jehx7cygw5 Hibernate: alter table categories add constraint UKt8o6pivur7nn124jehx7cygw5 unique (name) Hibernate: alter table favorites drop index UKc9b8d3pnfmb47hq5j8n8dcitd Hibernate: alter table favorites add constraint
